parsed.production_notes: The left side features an AI-generated avatar with unnaturally smooth skin, perfectly static posture, and slightly robotic lip-sync. The right side is a human-recorded selfie video with natural lighting, movement, and camera shake.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, fair complexion, red hair tied back, green eyes. Symmetrical, flawless facial features.
Young adult female, fair complexion, dark hair pulled back.

scenes.setting: Left: plain light grey background. Right: dark bedroom, lying on a white pillow.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot of Character A, a young woman with fair skin, green eyes, and red hair tied back. She is wearing a grey turtleneck sweater. She is positioned in the center of the frame against a plain, light grey background. The lighting is even and soft, typical of a studio setup. She is looking directly at the camera with a neutral, slightly friendly expression. Her posture is perfectly upright and static.

A close-up selfie-style shot of Character B, a young woman with fair skin and dark hair pulled back. She is wearing a black long-sleeve top. She is lying down, resting her head on a white pillow. Her right hand is tucked under her cheek. The background is dark, suggesting a bedroom at night. The lighting is dim, likely from a phone screen or a small bedside lamp, casting soft shadows on her face. She looks tired and sleepy, looking directly into the camera lens.

scenes.visual_description: A vertical split-screen composition. On the left, an AI-generated woman in a grey turtleneck speaks directly to the camera against a plain background. On the right, a human woman lies in bed in a dark room, resting her head on a pillow, looking sleepy. Text captions appear at the bottom of the screen, alternating between the two speakers, with red cross marks for incorrect grammar and green check marks for correct grammar. A logo appears in the top left corner later in the video.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: What are you doing?
Character B says: I can't sleep.
Character A says: Do you mean I can't fall asleep?
Character B says: Yes, I can't fall asleep. Now twelve o'clock!
Character A says: You should say it's twelve o'clock or it's midnight.
Character B says: Aha, okay! It's midnight.
Character A says: Great job! We can talk until you feel sleepy.
Character B says: Cool, but my English not good.
Character A says: Do you mean my English isn't good?
Character B says: Alright, my English isn't good.
Character A says: Perfect correction! Don't worry. If you practice with me every day on the Loora app, I'll help fix your mistakes and you'll be confident in no time.
Character B says: Okay, I'll download Loora and see you tomorrow!
